side_effects.description: Redness and histamine reaction at injection site when injecting cold peptide; significantly reduced but mild redness still present when allowing peptide to warm for 5-7 minutes before injection

protocol_notes: OP discovered that allowing the peptide to warm for at least 5-7 minutes before injecting significantly reduced injection site redness and histamine reactions. Previously tried rotating injection sites and varying injection angle (45 vs 90 degrees) without success.
